title: Resolution Adopting the Sangguniang Panlalawigang Pederasyon ng Sangguniang Kabataan of Laguna Resolution No. 1 Series 2020 Dated March 13, 2020 ?a Resolution Postponing All Forthcoming SK Related Activities Including But Not Limited to Summer League and Kk Assembly That Could Draw Crowd Within the Cities, Municipalities and Barangays in the Province of Laguna.?
